one_time_description: Robinson Huron Treaty Litigation Fund settlement - receivable recorded for past compensation arising from obligations under the Robinson Huron Treaty of 1850, settled August 31, 2023
economic_notes: Band operates enterprises including Gas Bar, Trading Post, Agawa Crafts and Canadian Carver. Subsidiary restructuring on April 1, 2023 created SRFN Limited Partnership structure. Subsequent to year end, purchased property for $11,630,000 through Serpent River Land Holding Inc. Robinson Huron Treaty $10 billion total settlement approved November 1, 2023 by First Nations. First Nation committed to per capita distribution to members with balance contributed to trust.
notes: Audit opinion is QUALIFIED for two reasons: (1) employee timesheets and supervisor approvals were inappropriately stored and unavailable for audit verification - unable to confirm payroll expenses for 2024 and 2023; (2) PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations not yet implemented as required effective April 1, 2022 - management has not completed assessment of tangible capital assets for potential AROs. The dominant financial event is the Robinson Huron Treaty settlement receivable of $377,961,380 which drives the massive annual surplus and inflates OSR calculation. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $13,351,545 + Gov of Canada $3,444,247 + Gov of Canada Trust Funds $7,471 + Province of Ontario $2,091,937 = $18,895,200; OFNLP $1,159,966 and Union of Ontario Indians $491,056 and North Shore Tribal Council $340,520 may also be government transfers bringing total to $20,886,742 - used narrower definition excluding tribal council transfers in total_government_transfers. Five fully consolidated subsidiaries: SRFN Economic Development Corporation, SRFN Non-Profit Housing, 2863895 Ontario Inc, SRFN Limited Partnership, Serpent River Land Holding Inc. Agawa Crafts and Canadian Carver LP accounted for on modified equity basis (99.99% owned but treated as investment at $524,770). Subsequent land purchase of $11,630,000 after year end. No budget prepared for the year.
